SUBJECT: Software Asset Management Policy and Procedure
SOFTWARE ASSET MANAGEMENT POLICY
Version Control
Version Number Description Prepared Date
Version Number Description Approved Date
Software Asset Management Policy and procedure

[Bảng chi tiết phần mềm/quy trình]:

SUBJECT: | Software Asset Management Policy and Procedure


[Bảng chi tiết phần mềm/quy trình]:
Version Number | Description | Prepared | Date
1.01 | Created document | To Huynh | August 2017


[Bảng chi tiết phần mềm/quy trình]:
Version Number | Description | Approved | Date
1.01 | Created document | Nha Nguyen | August 2017

Table of Contents
Software Asset Management Policy and procedure

Ngữ cảnh: 1. Introduction
Nội dung: [1. Introduction]
The document supports for Pizza Hut Viet Nam (PHV) Company to control and follow
Software Asset Management (SAM). It lays down the PHV policies and procedures in
respect of management of its software assets. The means of signifying agreement with
these policies and procedures is through the PHV Acceptable Use Policy.
Implementation of the guidelines will provide assurance to departments and PHV staff
that:
- A clear management policy for projects for open source, licensed and customized
software is established.
- Project based software assets are integrated with existing software assets in the
department.
- A clear software asset ownership policy covering the entire asset life‐cycle of the
assets and project is established.
- To prevent use of illegal software.
- To comply with software license conditions is adequately monitored.
- There are the appropriate number of licenses for each item of software in use.
- There are effective controls in place for the physical security of software media.

Ngữ cảnh: 2. Software Asset Management Policy Statement
Nội dung: [2. Software Asset Management Policy Statement]
It is the policy of PHV to respect all computer software copyrights and adhere to the
Terms & Conditions of any license to which PHV is a party. PHV will not condone the
use of any software that does not have a licence and any employee found to be using, or
in possession of unlicensed software may be the subject of disciplinary procedures.
It is the responsibility of all PHV employees, consultants, temporary or contract workers
to read, fully understand and signify agreement to PHV’s Acceptable Use Policy.

Ngữ cảnh: 3. Software Procedure for Implementation
Nội dung: [3. Software Procedure for Implementation]
The initial planning and implementation of a SAM framework that should be addressed
before developing an implementation plan. These include, but are not limited to:
o Gaining senior management support
o An assessment of the risks involved in not implementing: over‐licensing, under‐
licensing, increased expenditure, security breaches, software compatibility issues,
lost time and lack of technical support and product upgrades.
Software Asset Management Policy and procedure
o An assessment of benefits of implementing: savings through purchasing only
what is needed when it is needed, employees being able to work more efficiently,
assists with the compilation of an accurate budget, ability to manage and monitor
usage to link with IT Dept planning.
o The development of a business case to demonstrate the effectiveness of the
framework
o Consideration of what functions may be centralized: for example, license
management, procurement and software asset registers.
o Long term management: including continuous improvement, upgrades,
compliance and audits
Software needs to be controlled throughout its entire lifecycle, form the initial request to
de‐installation from a machine.
The Lifecycle diagram below (fig. 1) outlines all of the key procedures that should be
established to support and maintain a successful framework.
Figure 1

Ngữ cảnh: 4. Software Acquisition
Nội dung: [4. Software Acquisition]
Software Asset Management Policy and procedure
All computer software acquired by PHV must be purchased through the IT Dept. No
user may purchase software directly and the purchase of software by any other means
such as credit cards, expense accounts or petty cash is expressly forbidden.
Specialist software of department or special user should be consider and approved by
HODs/ CEO and IT Manager.

Ngữ cảnh: 5. Software Delivery
Nội dung: [5. Software Delivery]
All newly purchased software will be delivered to the IT Dept so that licenses can be
checked and Asset Registers updated. No other staff may take delivery of computer
software.

Ngữ cảnh: 6. Software Installation
Nội dung: [6. Software Installation]
Computer software can only be installed by the IT Dept, under no circumstances is
computer software be installed by any other PHV staff.
The Software standard for all user are listed below.
 Application for Department: depending on department requirement and specify
application. IT support will install the software to user.
o Finance & Accounting: Sun System, Q&A, Sales Audit Report
o Inventory: SAP B1, Winham
o Restaurant: Pointsoft, Loyalty program, Pizza Card, Call Center, Intranet (Support
Ticket), Ordering Online, Guest Survey
o Human Resources: Cadena HR System
 Software standard: the software standard will be install to all user who working at RSC
and for manager PC at store.
The software standard listed below:
SOFTWARE LIST
Special Software/ Department
Standard Software Application
Operation System : Window OS 7/10 - 32/64bit
Microsoft Office standard 2007-2010-2013
Sophos end point protection V10
Get approval from head of
Unikey 4.0
department
VNC/Team view Software
Fonts VN
PDF Reader
- Evaluation (Freeware and Shareware)
Shareware, Freeware & Public free software is bound by the same policies and
procedures as all software. No user may install any free or evaluation software onto
PHV systems.
Software Asset Management Policy and procedure

[Bảng chi tiết phần mềm/quy trình]:
SOFTWARE LIST
Standard Software | Special Software/ Department Application
Operation System : Window OS 7/10 - 32/64bit | Get approval from head of department
Microsoft Office standard 2007-2010-2013
Sophos end point protection V10
Unikey 4.0
VNC/Team view Software
Fonts VN
PDF Reader

Where a user has a valid business requirement for a piece of shareware or freeware
they will use the standard software acquisition procedure. Upon the appropriate
management agreements, the software will be obtained, tested and loaded to the user.
The Definitive Software Library in appendix 1/ 12.3 is definition the software free has
passed for the software verify and may ready for use by request.
If this software is shareware, and requires deletion or licensing after a trial period, the
user will be contacted prior to the end of trial date to ascertain whether he or she wishes
to retain use of the software. If the software is to be retained usual acquisition procedures
will be followed. If it is not required the software will be completely uninstalled.
- Internet Downloads
No software, whatsoever, may be downloaded from the Internet.
If a user has a valid and approved reason for an item of software available on the
internet, he/she will inform the IT support team using the standard software acquisition
procedure. The IT support Team will then check the licensing requirements for the
software, where appropriate purchase a license, download the software, virus check the
download and benchmark the software, prior to delivery to the end user.
- Email Attachments
Users may not load or use any software received via e-mail. Sharing software via email
is prohibited.
If you receive any unexpected files, which do not appear to be standard business
documents, inform the IT Dept. Immediately.
- Mobile/Laptop Users
PHV software policies apply to mobile users and all laptops will be equipped with
auditing software for regular checks.
Laptops used in PHV office will be subject to the same audit regime as desktop
machine. Users with laptops that are not regularly attached to the PHV network will be
subject to periodic recall for update and audit. See Auditing.
- Auditing
All users must be aware that the PHV electronically audits all computers on a regular
basis. Sample random audits also may be carried out.
The PHV uses auditing software on a regular basis to ascertain whether all of the
software loaded is legal. The audit is checked and reconciled with the Definitive
Software Library and all unauthorized software is deleted. The source of the
unauthorized software will be ascertained and disciplinary action may be taken.

Ngữ cảnh: 7. Software Movements
Nội dung: [7. Software Movements]
In the event of staff relocations Department Managers are email to IT support team for
the alert and preparation. As part of this procedure they are to ascertain whether new
software will be required. Old software can be re-distributed and the new locations of
staff, hardware, network points and software for the asset register recorded by the IT
support and inventory member
Software Asset Management Policy and procedure
All staff or department moves must be controlled through the HODs and HR
management request so that the appropriate software can be added or removed and
asset registers updated.

Ngữ cảnh: 8. Software Retirement & Disposal
Nội dung: [8. Software Retirement & Disposal]
The retirement of Software/Hardware may only be carried out by the IT Dept with
approved from FIN/ IT management/ CEO.
Once a computer is deemed ready for disposal, all software will be removed. Where
the license permits, the software will be re-used, stored for future use or retired.
Software purchased as part of a computer will be disposed of with the computer as
these licenses are non-transferable.
All PHV data will be removed and the hard disk will be securely cleaned or physically
destroyed. The asset register will be updated and the certificate of disposal/destruction
will be held on file.

Ngữ cảnh: 9. Compliance and Documentation
Nội dung: [9. Compliance and Documentation]
All licenses, invoices copy and original media of the software are collected and
securely by the IT Dept.
All media must be tracking in and out by authorized person as defined of IT manager.
A periodic check will be carried out by accountant and IT inventory to ensure the
actual media matches with the inventory.

Ngữ cảnh: 10. Disaster Recovery
Nội dung: [10. Disaster Recovery]
The owner of every business process and support process is responsible for ensuring that
an appropriate business resumption risk assessment is carried out. Where that
resumption includes the redeployment or reinstallation of software in support of business
activities the software licencing must comply with this Policy and the conditions of the
original Vendor license.
The IT Dept is responsible for regularly reviewing its ability to recover or re-supply the
organization, within the timeframe required, with all the business software that will be
needed to effect recovery of the business in the event of a major disaster

Ngữ cảnh: 11. Disciplinary Procedures for Breach
Nội dung: [11. Disciplinary Procedures for Breach]
The PHV’s software policies are implemented to safeguard the PHV from the many
varying laws surrounding software use. Any user found to be in breach of these policies
may be subject to disciplinary procedures.

Ngữ cảnh: 12. Appendix – Procedures and Form
Nội dung: [12. Appendix – Procedures and Form]

Ngữ cảnh: 12. Appendix – Procedures and Form > 12.1 Acquisition, Delivery & Installation
Nội dung: [12.1 Acquisition, Delivery & Installation]
Software Asset Management Policy and procedure
The user is to call the IT support team requesting a quote for the software and complete
the Equipment/ software Request Form with obtain the relevant authorization signature
and pass to the IT dept as a Non Standard Request.
IT support verify the software request and process for the software ordering
Once delivered, the software will be added to the Authorised Software List against the
specific user.
The software will then be identified to the audit tool and loaded to the user’s workstation
by IT support team.
The software will be added to the Definitive Software List and the media will be placed
in the secure storage area, controlled by the IT Dept .
